dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Real-time quota overview
dashboard.noAccountDescription: Add an Antigravity account to start monitoring your quota usage. Go to the Accounts page to get started.
dashboard.noQuotaData: No quota data available yet. Click Refresh to fetch the latest data.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.subtitle: Manage your Antigravity accounts
accounts.noAccountsDesc: Add your first Antigravity account to start monitoring quotas and managing your AI IDE sessions.

addModal.title: Add Account
addModal.subtitle: Choose how to add your Antigravity account
addModal.oauthDesc: Authorize with your Google account via browser
addModal.oauthExplain: Sign in with your Google account to automatically import your Antigravity credentials.
addModal.tokenPlaceholder: Paste your Google/Antigravity refresh token here (e.g., 1//0g...)
addModal.tokenValidation: The token will be validated against Google's API to verify it's valid.
addModal.importExplain: Automatically detect and import the account from your local Antigravity IDE installation.
addModal.importReq2: You must be logged in to Antigravity
addModal.securityNote: All tokens are encrypted with AES-256-GCM before local storage. Nothing is sent to external servers.
addModal.waitingBrowser: Waiting for authorization in your browser...
addModal.validatingToken: Validating token and fetching account info...

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Customize your experience
settings.pollIntervalDesc: How often to check for quota updates
settings.lowQuotaDesc: Alert when remaining quota falls below this percentage
settings.restartAfterSwitchDesc: Automatically restart Antigravity after switching accounts
settings.launchAtStartupDesc: Start QuotaDeck AI when your computer boots
settings.minimizeToTrayDesc: Keep running in the system tray when closed
